name: synthwave-noir
author: UnionPAC
description: Rain-soaked neon city. Hot pink, electric purple, and neon cyan on deep purple-black.

name: ocean-depths
author: UnionPAC
description: Bioluminescent abyss. Cold blue-grey foreground, glowing teal accents on near-black.

name: ember-ash
author: UnionPAC
description: Forge heat and smoldering coal. Warm cream foreground, molten amber and fire red on dark charcoal.

name: forest-dark
author: UnionPAC
description: Old growth canopy, moss and rain. Green-tinted foreground and white, vibrant emerald accents on forest black.
